TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_trv, title = {Seediq Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://trv.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == Edirne == Edirne Nsgan Edirne, o gaga Edirne Province ka Turkey, kmpraan kana dxgal o 0.844km¬≤, (dxgal dgiyaq o 0.326 km¬≤, dxgal pmblxan o 0.42 km¬≤) kmhbragan hiyi o 400.280, sapah o 6.098, seejiq tnpusu 180.327 hiyi, knhbragan hiyi o 66% (seejiq Turkey). Seejiq Turkey ka hbaraw balay alang hini. nyusan qpahan Nsgan Edirne o niqan 24 alang ni maxal 20. 20 o, Kocasinan, Fatih, Ňě√ľkr√ľpaŇüa, ńįstasyon, 1. Murat, Barutluk, Menzilahir, NiŇüancńĪpaŇüa, Medrese Ali Bey, SaricapaŇüa, Sabuni, TalatpaŇüa, Meydan, BabademirtaŇü, Abdurrahman, √áavuŇübey, MithatpaŇüa, Dilaverbey, Yeniimaret, YńĪldńĪrńĪm HacńĪ Sarraf, YńĪldirim BeyazńĪt, ma Karaańüa√ß. Pusupnyahan patas Snluan qcinuh:Commons www.edirne.bel.tr

S.FORM: == Edirne == Edirne Nsgan Edirne, o gaga Edirne Province ka Turkey, kmpraan kana dxgal o 0.844km¬≤, (dxgal dgiyaq o 0.326 km¬≤, dxgal pmblxan o 0.42 km¬≤) kmhbragan hiyi o 400.280, sapah o 6.098, seejiq tnpusu 180.327 hiyi, knhbragan hiyi o 66% (seejiq Turkey). Seejiq Turkey ka hbaraw balay alang hini. nyusan qpahan Nsgan Edirne o niqan 24 alang ni maxal 20. 20 o, Kocasinan, Fatih, Ňě√ľkr√ľpaŇüa, ńįstasyon, 1. Murat, Barutluk, Menzilahir, NiŇüancńĪpaŇüa, Medrese Ali Bey, SaricapaŇüa, Sabuni, TalatpaŇüa, Meydan, BabademirtaŇü, Abdurrahman, √áavuŇübey, MithatpaŇüa, Dilaverbey, Yeniimaret, YńĪldńĪrńĪm HacńĪ Sarraf, YńĪldirim BeyazńĪt, ma Karaańüa√ß.
